MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. of LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY, INC. 861-4444 for defendant HILLARY YANCEY moving to set aside default

Mr. Drohan provided proof of service. The court having reviewed this document granted the motion. Mr. Yancey previously evicted is restored possession. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
